Home / Service Areas / Redmond

Smart-home in Redmond, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Redmond and surrounding communities

Serving Redmond, WA

Serving the Microsoft campus area, Onyx Smart Home brings cutting-edge automation to Redmond's tech-savvy residents. We understand the unique needs of professionals in this innovation-driven community and offer solutions like remote work setups, smart security, and energy management. Redmond's rainy climate makes our weather-adaptive systems, including leak detection and smart irrigation, particularly valuable. From modern apartments to single-family homes, we design systems that align with Redmond's fast-paced lifestyle. Our expertise in integrating voice control, smart thermostats, and home theaters ensures your space is both functional and futuristic.

Redmond is a tech hub with a mix of corporate campuses, suburban neighborhoods, and a highly educated population.

Smart-home Services in Redmond

Whole-Home Automation

Complete control of lighting, climate, security, and entertainment from one intuitive system.

Learn more →

Climate Control Systems

Smart HVAC solutions that combat Seattle's dampness while optimizing energy use.

Learn more →

Smart Security Networks

Comprehensive protection blending surveillance, access control, and emergency response.

Learn more →

Voice Control Integration

Natural language control customized for your home's ecosystem and regional needs.

Learn more →

Smart Lighting Solutions

Adaptive illumination combating Seattle's dark winters while enhancing ambiance.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Redmond and the surrounding area.
